win_condition: Most victory points after 12 rounds and final harvest

categories.label: Sheep
categories.description: Points based on number of sheep (0 sheep = -2 VP)

categories.description: Points based on number of donkeys (0 donkeys = -2 VP)

categories.description: Points based on number of wild boar (0 = -2 VP)

categories.description: Points based on number of cattle (0 = -2 VP)

categories.label: Dogs
categories.description: Points based on number of dogs

categories.label: Grain
categories.description: Points based on grain quantity (0 = -1 VP)

categories.label: Vegetables
categories.description: Points based on vegetable quantity (0 = -1 VP)

categories.description: -1 VP per empty space on home board

categories.label: Mines
categories.description: 3 VP per ore mine, 4 VP per ruby mine
